scripts.build: pnpm run ghostshift:sync-shared && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.cf:d1:migrate:live: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --env live
scripts.dev: pnpm run ghostshift:sync-shared && pnpm exec tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.mcp: pnpm run ghostshift:sync-shared && pnpm exec tsx src/mcp.ts
scripts.submission:check: pnpm run ghostshift:sync-shared && pnpm exec tsx scripts/check-submission.ts
scripts.test: pnpm run ghostshift:sync-shared && pnpm exec tsx --test src/**/*.test.ts
